plugins.name: vibesubin
plugins.description: A caring skill pack for vibe coders — portable engineering discipline (refactor verification, security, repo rot, AI-friendly docs, CI, secrets lifecycle, project conventions, repo bloat, design unification) encoded as agent skills, plus two direct-call helpers: an optional Claude Code + Codex wrapper for post-edit review loops, and an issue-driven release-cycle orchestrator for planning and shipping versions.
